Requirement_Summary: Enforce MFA for privileged and user access; disable legacy authentication protocols
Evidence_Examples: MFA audit logs, Conditional Access reports
Implementation_Guidance: Create Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users and admins

Requirement_Summary: Implement just-in-time (JIT) and just-enough-access (JEA) for admin roles
Evidence_Examples: PIM audit logs, role assignment reports
Implementation_Guidance: Configure PIM and Conditional Access for admin roles

Requirement_Summary: Block legacy authentication protocols that bypass modern security controls
Implementation_Guidance: Create Conditional Access policy to block legacy auth protocols

Requirement_Summary: Classify all data assets based on sensitivity and regulatory requirements
Evidence_Examples: Data classification reports, sensitivity label usage
Implementation_Guidance: Deploy sensitivity labels: Public > General > Confidential > Highly Confidential

Requirement_Summary: Prevent unauthorized sharing of sensitive data across communication channels
Evidence_Examples: DLP policy match reports, incident logs
Implementation_Guidance: Create DLP policy detecting PII across Exchange, SharePoint, Teams

Requirement_Summary: Ensure all data at rest is encrypted using approved encryption standards
Implementation_Guidance: Require BitLocker encryption via Intune device compliance policy

Requirement_Summary: Retain data for required periods per regulatory mandates; dispose securely
Implementation_Guidance: Create retention labels with 7-year retention for financial records

Requirement_Summary: Implement network segmentation to isolate critical systems
Implementation_Guidance: Use Conditional Access to require compliant/managed devices for network access

Requirement_Summary: Deploy and maintain endpoint protection on all devices
Implementation_Guidance: Require antivirus and OS updates via Intune compliance policy

Requirement_Summary: Manage and secure mobile devices accessing organizational resources
Implementation_Guidance: Deploy mobile compliance policy requiring encryption and PIN

Requirement_Summary: Monitor communications for regulatory compliance and policy violations
Implementation_Guidance: Configure communication compliance policies in Microsoft Purview

Requirement_Summary: Detect and respond to insider risk indicators and data theft
Implementation_Guidance: Configure insider risk management policies in Microsoft Purview

Requirement_Summary: Establish and maintain information governance policies
Implementation_Guidance: Create DLP policies for financial data governance

Requirement_Summary: Enable and retain audit logs for all critical systems and user activities
Evidence_Examples: Audit log exports, SIEM integration reports
Implementation_Guidance: Configure DLP to monitor and alert on sensitive data activities
